message:
feat(server): DbConn migration, ambient render throttle, RenderItem signature update, and query optimizations

tool_metrics: Replace SqliteConnection with DbConn for metrics persistence.
Fix cross-connection visibility issues in tests by dropping the writer connection
before opening a reader, ensuring FrankenConnection flushes data to disk. Update
pruning test to use same-connection verification instead of cross-connection queries.

tui_app: Add ambient_last_render_tick and ambient_render_invocations fields to
prevent duplicate ambient renders within the same tick bucket. Update tick budget
comment to reflect 33ms (~30fps) interval. Collapse ThemeId match arms for Doom
and Quake to share the default config. Add regression test verifying ambient
render throttles to exactly once per tick bucket.

tui_events + tui_screens: Update all RenderItem::render signatures to accept the
new _skip_rows (u16) parameter for variable-height row support. Affected types:
TimelineRow, MessageRow, SearchHitRow, ExplorerRow, ExplorerDisplayRow,
MessageEntry, MessageRenderRow, SearchResultRow, TimelineEntry,
CommitTimelineEntry, CombinedTimelineRow.

tui_poller: Optimize ack_pending_count query from JOIN to subquery (IN-select)
for better SQLite query planning. Quote reserved keyword "exclusive" in
reservation fetch query. Add debug eprintln statements for reservation snapshot
debugging.

ack_ttl + cleanup: Replace FrankenSQLite limitation comments with standard pool
setup comments reflecting the unified DbConn architecture.

startup_checks: Update corruption recovery guidance to recommend checkpoint +
VACUUM + validated file copy instead of VACUUM INTO.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
